title: 共同通信杯の後に・先輩を追って

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa, cheered on by her friends, does
an incredible job in the Kyodo News Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, this race is only a stepping stone. Now
that she has strayed from the Classic route, she
wonders what to do for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl, an older student who El
Condor Pasa looks up to, suggests taking on the
NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa decides to step into the G1 to
prove herself to the world. It's sure to be an
intense battle.
